component.name: Asp.Versioning.Abstractions
component.description: The abstractions library for API versioning.

component.name: Asp.Versioning.Http
component.description: A service API versioning library for Microsoft ASP.NET Core.

component.name: Asp.Versioning.Mvc
component.description: A service API versioning library for Microsoft ASP.NET Core MVC.

component.name: Asp.Versioning.Mvc.ApiExplorer
component.description: The API Explorer extensions for ASP.NET Core API Versioning.

component.name: Azure.AI.OpenAI
component.description: Azure OpenAI's official extension package for using OpenAI's .NET library with the Azure OpenAI Service.

component.name: Azure.Core
component.description: This is the implementation of the Azure Client Pipeline

component.name: Azure.Core
component.description: This is the implementation of the Azure Client Pipeline

component.name: Azure.Identity
component.description: Provides APIs for authenticating to Microsoft Entra ID

component.name: Castle.Core
component.description: Castle Core, including DynamicProxy, Logging Abstractions and DictionaryAdapter

component.name: coverlet.collector
component.description: Coverlet is a cross platform code coverage library for .NET, with support for line, branch and method coverage.

component.name: Dapper
component.description: A high performance Micro-ORM supporting SQL Server, MySQL, Sqlite, SqlCE, Firebird etc. Major Sponsor: Dapper Plus from ZZZ Projects.

component.name: dbup-core
component.description: DbUp makes it easy to deploy and upgrade SQL Server databases by running change scripts. This is the core library and should be used in conjunction with the database specific package (eg dbup-sqlserver, dbup-mysql)

component.name: dbup-sqlserver
component.description: DbUp makes it easy to deploy and upgrade Microsoft SQL Server databases. This package adds SqlServer support.

component.name: DocumentFormat.OpenXml
component.description:
The Open XML SDK provides tools for working with Office Word, Excel, and PowerPoint documents. It supports scenarios such as:
- High-performance generation of word-processing documents, spreadsheets, and presentations. - Populating content in Word files from an XML data source. - Splitting up (shredding) a Word or PowerPoint file into multiple files, and combining multiple Word/PowerPoint files into a single file. - Extraction of data from Excel documents. - Searching and replacing content in Word/PowerPoint using regular expressions. - Updating cached data and embedded spreadsheets for charts in Word/PowerPoint. - Document modification, such as removing tracked revisions or removing unacceptable content from documents.

component.name: DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Framework
component.description:
The Open XML SDK provides tools for working with Office Word, Excel, and PowerPoint documents. It supports scenarios such as:
- High-performance generation of word-processing documents, spreadsheets, and presentations. - Populating content in Word files from an XML data source. - Splitting up (shredding) a Word or PowerPoint file into multiple files, and combining multiple Word/PowerPoint files into a single file. - Extraction of data from Excel documents. - Searching and replacing content in Word/PowerPoint using regular expressions. - Updating cached data and embedded spreadsheets for charts in Word/PowerPoint. - Document modification, such as removing tracked revisions or removing unacceptable content from documents.

component.name: FluentAssertions
component.description:
A very extensive set of extension methods that allow you to more naturally specify the expected outcome of a TDD or BDD-style unit tests. Targets .NET Framework 4.7, .NET 6, as well as .NET Standard 2.0 and 2.1. Supports the unit test frameworks MSTest2, NUnit3, XUnit2, XUnit3, MSpec and TUnit.
Supported by InfoSupport B.V.

component.name: FluentValidation
component.description: A validation library for .NET that uses a fluent interface to construct strongly-typed validation rules.
component.copyright: Copyright (c) Jeremy Skinner, .NET Foundation, and contributors 2008-2023

component.name: FluentValidation.AspNetCore
component.description: AspNetCore integration for FluentValidation
component.copyright: Copyright (c) Jeremy Skinner, .NET Foundation, and contributors 2008-2022

component.name: FluentValidation.DependencyInjectionExtensions
component.description: Dependency injection extensions for FluentValidation
component.copyright: Copyright (c) Jeremy Skinner, .NET Foundation, and contributors 2008-2023

component.name: Humanizer.Core
component.description: Humanizer core package that contains the library and the neutral language (English) resources

component.name: IdentityModel
component.description: OpenID Connect & OAuth 2.0 client library

component.name: JetBrains.Annotations
component.description: Annotations to increase accuracy of JetBrains Rider and ReSharper code inspections

component.name: Json.More.Net
component.description: Provides extended functionality for the System.Text.Json namespace.

component.name: JsonPointer.Net
component.description: JSON Pointer built on the System.Text.Json namespace

component.name: JsonSchema.Net
component.description: JSON Schema built on the System.Text.Json namespace

component.name: Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer
component.description:
ASP.NET Core middleware that enables an application to receive an OpenID Connect bearer token.
This package was built from the source code at https://github.com/dotnet/dotnet/tree/a612c2a1056fe3265387ae3ff7c94eba1505caf9

component.name: Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.OpenIdConnect
component.description:
ASP.NET Core middleware that enables an application to support the OpenID Connect authentication workflow.
This package was built from the source code at https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore/tree/ed74665e773dd1ebea3289c5662d71c590305932

component.name: Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization
component.description:
ASP.NET Core authorization classes. Commonly used types: Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.AllowAnonymousAttribute Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.AuthorizeAttribute
This package was built from the source code at https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore/tree/ed74665e773dd1ebea3289c5662d71c590305932

component.name: Microsoft.AspNetCore.Metadata
component.description:
ASP.NET Core metadata.
This package was built from the source code at https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore/tree/ed74665e773dd1ebea3289c5662d71c590305932

component.name: Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Testing
component.description:
Support for writing functional tests for MVC applications.
This package was built from the source code at https://github.com/dotnet/dotnet/tree/a612c2a1056fe3265387ae3ff7c94eba1505caf9

component.name: Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi
component.description:
Provides APIs for annotating route handler endpoints in ASP.NET Core with OpenAPI annotations.
This package was built from the source code at https://github.com/dotnet/dotnet/tree/a612c2a1056fe3265387ae3ff7c94eba1505caf9

component.name: Microsoft.AspNetCore.TestHost
component.description:
ASP.NET Core web server for writing and running tests.
This package was built from the source code at https://github.com/dotnet/dotnet/tree/a612c2a1056fe3265387ae3ff7c94eba1505caf9

component.name: Microsoft.Azure.Services.AppAuthentication
component.description: There is a newer version of this library available here: https://www.nuget.org/packages/Azure.Identity/ Migration guide: https://docs.microsoft.com/dotnet/api/overview/azure/app-auth-migration AppAuth no longer receives new feature improvements. Enables a service to authenticate to Azure services using the developer's Azure Active Directory/ Microsoft account during development, and authenticate as itself (using OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials flow) when deployed to Azure.

component.name: Microsoft.Bcl.AsyncInterfaces
component.description:
Provides the IAsyncEnumerable<T> and IAsyncDisposable interfaces and helper types for .NET Standard 2.0. This package is not required starting with .NET Standard 2.1 and .NET Core 3.0.
Commonly Used Types: System.IAsyncDisposable System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerator

component.name: Microsoft.Bcl.AsyncInterfaces
component.description:
Provides the IAsyncEnumerable<T> and IAsyncDisposable interfaces and helper types for .NET Standard 2.0. This package is not required starting with .NET Standard 2.1 and .NET Core 3.0.
Commonly Used Types: System.IAsyncDisposable System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerator

component.name: Microsoft.CodeCoverage
component.description: Microsoft.CodeCoverage package brings infra for collecting code coverage from vstest.console.exe and "dotnet test".

component.name: Microsoft.Data.SqlClient
component.description:
The current data provider for SQL Server and Azure SQL databases. This has replaced System.Data.SqlClient. These classes provide access to SQL and encapsulate database-specific protocols, including tabular data stream (TDS).
Commonly Used Types: Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlException Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlDataReader Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlTransaction Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameterCollection Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlClientFactory
When using NuGet 3.x this package requires at least version 3.4.

component.name: Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SNI.runtime
component.description:
Internal implementation package not meant for direct consumption. Please do not reference directly.
When using NuGet 3.x this package requires at least version 3.4.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.ApiDescription.Server
component.description:
MSBuild tasks and targets for build-time Swagger and OpenApi document generation
This package was built from the source code at https://github.com/dotnet/dotnet/tree/b0f34d51fccc69fd334253924abd8d6853fad7aa

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Abstractions
component.description:
Caching abstractions for in-memory cache and distributed cache.
Commonly Used Types: Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Distributed.IDistributedCache Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Memory.IMemoryCache

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Memory
component.description: In-memory cache implementation of Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Memory.IMemoryCache.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration
component.description: Implementation of key-value pair based configuration for Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration. Includes the memory configuration provider.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Abstractions
component.description: Provides abstractions of key-value pair based configuration. Interfaces defined in this package are implemented by classes in Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration and other configuration packages.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder
component.description: Provides the functionality to bind an object to data in configuration providers for Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration. This package enables you to represent the configuration data as strongly-typed classes defined in the application code. To bind a configuration, use the Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.ConfigurationBinder.Get extension method on the IConfiguration object. To use this package, you also need to install a package for the configuration provider, for example, Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Json for the JSON provider.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.CommandLine
component.description: Command line configuration provider implementation for Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration. This package enables you to read configuration parameters from the command line arguments of your application. You can use CommandLineConfigurationExtensions.AddCommandLine extension method on IConfigurationBuilder to add the command line configuration provider to the configuration builder.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.EnvironmentVariables
component.description: Environment variables configuration provider implementation for Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration. This package enables you to read configuration parameters from environment variables. You can use EnvironmentVariablesExtensions.AddEnvironmentVariables extension method on IConfigurationBuilder to add the environment variables configuration provider to the configuration builder.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.FileExtensions
component.description: Provides a base class for file-based configuration providers used with Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration and extension methods for configuring them.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Json
component.description: JSON configuration provider implementation for Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration. This package enables you to read your application's settings from a JSON file. You can use JsonConfigurationExtensions.AddJsonFile extension method on IConfigurationBuilder to add the JSON configuration provider to the configuration builder.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.UserSecrets
component.description: User secrets configuration provider implementation for Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration. User secrets mechanism enables you to override application configuration settings with values stored in the local secrets file. You can use UserSecretsConfigurationExtensions.AddUserSecrets extension method on IConfigurationBuilder to add user secrets provider to the configuration builder.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection
component.description: Default implementation of dependency injection for Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.Abstractions
component.description:
Abstractions for dependency injection.
Commonly Used Types: Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.Abstractions
component.description:
Abstractions for dependency injection.
Commonly Used Types: Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyModel
component.description:
Provides abstractions for reading `.deps` files. When a .NET application is compiled, the SDK generates a JSON manifest file (`<ApplicationName>.deps.json`) that contains information about application dependencies. You can use `Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyModel` to read information from this manifest at run time. This is useful when you want to dynamically compile code (for example, using Roslyn Emit API) referencing the same dependencies as your main application.
By default, the dependency manifest contains information about the application's target framework and runtime dependencies. Set the PreserveCompilationContext project property to `true` to additionally include information about reference assemblies used during compilation.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyModel
component.description:
Provides abstractions for reading `.deps` files. When a .NET application is compiled, the SDK generates a JSON manifest file (`<ApplicationName>.deps.json`) that contains information about application dependencies. You can use `Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyModel` to read information from this manifest at run time. This is useful when you want to dynamically compile code (for example, using Roslyn Emit API) referencing the same dependencies as your main application.
By default, the dependency manifest contains information about the application's target framework and runtime dependencies. Set the PreserveCompilationContext project property to `true` to additionally include information about reference assemblies used during compilation.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics
component.description: This package includes the default implementation of IMeterFactory and additional extension methods to easily register it with the Dependency Injection framework.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Abstractions
component.description:
Diagnostic abstractions for Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.
Commonly Used Types: Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.IMetricsBuilder Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.IMetricsListener Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.InstrumentRule Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.MeterScope Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.MetricsBuilderExtensions Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.MetricsOptions

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.FileProviders.Abstractions
component.description:
Abstractions of files and directories.
Commonly Used Types: Microsoft.Extensions.FileProviders.IDirectoryContents Microsoft.Extensions.FileProviders.IFileInfo Microsoft.Extensions.FileProviders.IFileProvider

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.FileProviders.Composite
component.description: Composite file and directory providers for Microsoft.Extensions.FileProviders.

File provider for files in embedded resources for Microsoft.Extensions.FileProviders.
This package was built from the source code at https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore/tree/ed74665e773dd1ebea3289c5662d71c590305932

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.FileProviders.Physical
component.description: File provider for physical files for Microsoft.Extensions.FileProviders.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.FileSystemGlobbing
component.description: File system globbing to find files matching a specified pattern.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting
component.description: Hosting and startup infrastructures for applications.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.Abstractions
component.description: Hosting and startup abstractions for applications.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Logging
component.description: Logging infrastructure default implementation for Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions

Logging abstractions for Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions
component.description:
Logging abstractions for Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.
Commonly Used Types: Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger<TCategoryName> Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Logger<T> Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessage Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions.NullLogger

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Configuration
component.description: Configuration support for Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Console
component.description: Console logger provider implementation for Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Debug
component.description: Debug output logger provider implementation for Microsoft.Extensions.Logging. This logger logs messages to a debugger monitor by writing messages with System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine().

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventLog
component.description: Windows Event Log logger provider implementation for Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventSource
component.description: EventSource/EventListener logger provider implementation for Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Options
component.description: Provides a strongly typed way of specifying and accessing settings using dependency injection.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Options
component.description: Provides a strongly typed way of specifying and accessing settings using dependency injection.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Options.ConfigurationExtensions
component.description: Provides additional configuration specific functionality related to Options.

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives
component.description:
Primitives shared by framework extensions. Commonly used types include:
Commonly Used Types: Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.IChangeToken Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringValues Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringSegment

component.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives
component.description:
Primitives shared by framework extensions. Commonly used types include:
Commonly Used Types: Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.IChangeToken Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringValues Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringSegment

component.name: Microsoft.Identity.Client
component.description: This package contains the binaries of the Microsoft Authentication Library for .NET (MSAL.NET). MSAL.NET makes it easy to obtain tokens from the Microsoft identity platform for developers (formerly Azure AD v2.0) signing-in users with work & school accounts, Microsoft personal accounts, and social identities via Azure AD B2C. These tokens provide access to Microsoft Cloud API and any other API secured by the Microsoft identity platform. This version supports adding authentication functionality to your .NET based clients - .NET, .NET Framework, .NET MAUI

component.name: Microsoft.Identity.Client.Extensions.Msal
component.description: This package contains the public client (desktop) caching to Microsoft Authentication Library for .NET (MSAL.NET)

component.name: Microsoft.IdentityModel.Abstractions
component.description: A package containing thin abstractions for Microsoft.IdentityModel.

component.name: Microsoft.IdentityModel.Clients.ActiveDirectory
component.description: There is a newer version of this library available here: https://www.nuget.org/packages/Microsoft.Identity.Client/ Migration guide: https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/active-directory/develop/msal-net-migration ADAL no longer receives new feature improvements.

component.name: Microsoft.IdentityModel.JsonWebTokens
component.description: Includes types that provide support for creating, serializing and validating JSON Web Tokens. This is a newer, faster version of System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt that has additional functionality.

component.name: Microsoft.IdentityModel.JsonWebTokens
component.description: Includes types that provide support for creating, serializing and validating JSON Web Tokens. This is a newer, faster version of System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt that has additional functionality.

component.name: Microsoft.IdentityModel.Logging
component.description: Includes Event Source based logging support.

component.name: Microsoft.IdentityModel.Logging
component.description: Includes Event Source based logging support.

component.name: Microsoft.IdentityModel.Protocols
component.description: Provides base protocol support for OpenIdConnect and WsFederation.

component.name: Microsoft.IdentityModel.Protocols
component.description: Provides base protocol support for OpenIdConnect and WsFederation.

component.name: Microsoft.IdentityModel.Protocols.OpenIdConnect
component.description: Includes types that provide support for OpenIdConnect protocol.

component.name: Microsoft.IdentityModel.Protocols.OpenIdConnect
component.description: Includes types that provide support for OpenIdConnect protocol.

component.name: Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens
component.description: Includes types that provide support for SecurityTokens, Cryptographic operations: Signing, Verifying Signatures, Encryption.

component.name: Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens
component.description: Includes types that provide support for SecurityTokens, Cryptographic operations: Signing, Verifying Signatures, Encryption.

component.description: The MSbuild targets and properties for building .NET test projects.

component.name: Microsoft.NETCore.Platforms
component.description: Provides runtime information required to resolve target framework, platform, and runtime specific implementations of .NETCore packages. When using NuGet 3.x this package requires at least version 3.4.

component.name: Microsoft.OpenApi
component.description: .NET models with JSON and YAML writers for OpenAPI specification

component.name: Microsoft.SqlServer.Server
component.description:
This is a helper library for Microsoft.Data.SqlClient enabling cross framework support of UDT types.

author.name: MyCSharp.de, Benjamin Abt, Günther Foidl and Contributors

component.name: MyCSharp.HttpUserAgentParser
component.description: Parses user agents for Browser, Platform and Bots.

component.name: NETStandard.Library
component.description: A set of standard .NET APIs that are prescribed to be used and supported together. This includes all of the APIs in the NETStandard.Platform package plus additional libraries that are core to .NET but built on top of NETStandard.Platform. When using NuGet 3.x this package requires at least version 3.4.

component.name: Newtonsoft.Json
component.description: Json.NET is a popular high-performance JSON framework for .NET

component.name: Nito.AsyncEx.Context
component.description: A single-threaded async-compatible context.

component.name: Nito.AsyncEx.Tasks
component.description: Common helper methods for tasks as used in asynchronous programming.

component.name: Nito.Disposables
component.description: IDisposable and IAsyncDisposable helper types.

component.name: NUglify
component.description: NUglify provides minification and compression methods for CSS, JavaScript and HTML files for .NET

component.name: OpenAI
component.description: The official .NET library for the OpenAI service API.

component.name: OpenTelemetry
component.description: OpenTelemetry .NET SDK

component.name: OpenTelemetry.Api
component.description: OpenTelemetry .NET API

component.name: OpenTelemetry.Api.ProviderBuilderExtensions
component.description: Contains extensions to register OpenTelemetry in applications using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection

component.name: OpenTelemetry.Exporter.Console
component.description: Console exporter for OpenTelemetry .NET

component.name: OpenTelemetry.Exporter.Prometheus.AspNetCore
component.description: ASP.NET Core middleware for hosting OpenTelemetry .NET Prometheus Exporter

component.name: OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting
component.description: Contains extensions to start OpenTelemetry in applications using Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting

component.name: OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore
component.description: ASP.NET Core instrumentation for OpenTelemetry .NET

component.name: OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.Http
component.description: HTTP instrumentation for OpenTelemetry .NET.

component.name: OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.SqlClient
component.description: SqlClient instrumentation for OpenTelemetry .NET.

component.name: Polly
component.description: Polly is a .NET resilience and transient-fault-handling library that allows developers to express resilience and transient fault handling policies such as Retry, Circuit Breaker, Timeout, Bulkhead Isolation, and Fallback in a fluent and thread-safe manner.

component.name: Polly.Core
component.description: Polly.Core is a .NET resilience and transient-fault-handling library that allows developers to express resilience strategies such as Retry, Circuit Breaker, Hedging, Timeout, Chaos and Fallback in a fluent and thread-safe manner.

component.name: QuestPDF
component.description: QuestPDF is an open-source, modern and battle-tested library that can help you with generating PDF documents by offering friendly, discoverable and predictable C# fluent API. Easily generate PDF reports, invoices, exports, etc.

component.name: Serilog
component.description: Simple .NET logging with fully-structured events

component.name: Serilog.AspNetCore
component.description: Serilog support for ASP.NET Core logging

component.name: Serilog.Extensions.Hosting
component.description: Serilog support for .NET Core logging in hosted services

component.name: Serilog.Extensions.Logging
component.description: Low-level Serilog provider for Microsoft.Extensions.Logging

component.name: Serilog.Formatting.Compact
component.description: A simple, compact JSON-based event format for Serilog.

component.name: Serilog.Settings.Configuration
component.description: Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration (appsettings.json) support for Serilog.

component.name: Serilog.Sinks.Console
component.description: A Serilog sink that writes log events to the console/terminal.

component.name: Serilog.Sinks.Debug
component.description: A Serilog sink that writes log events to the debug output window.

component.name: Serilog.Sinks.File
component.description: Write Serilog events to text files in plain or JSON format.

component.description: Middleware to expose an embedded version of the swagger-ui from an ASP.NET Core application

component.name: System.ClientModel
component.description: Contains building blocks for clients that call cloud services.

component.name: System.ClientModel
component.description: Contains building blocks for clients that call cloud services.

component.name: System.CodeDom
component.description: Provides types that can be used to model the structure of a source code document and to output source code for that model in C# or Visual Basic.

component.name: System.Configuration.ConfigurationManager
component.description:
Provides types that support using configuration files.
Commonly Used Types: System.Configuration.Configuration System.Configuration.ConfigurationManager

component.name: System.Configuration.ConfigurationManager
component.description: Provides types that support using XML configuration files (app.config). This package exists only to support migrating existing .NET Framework code that already uses System.Configuration. When writing new code, use another configuration system instead, such as Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.

component.name: System.Diagnostics.EventLog
component.description:
Provides the System.Diagnostics.EventLog class, which allows the applications to use the Windows event log service.
Commonly Used Types: System.Diagnostics.EventLog

component.name: System.Diagnostics.EventLog
component.description:
Provides the System.Diagnostics.EventLog class, which allows the applications to use the windows event log service.
Commonly Used Types: System.Diagnostics.EventLog

component.name: System.Diagnostics.EventLog
component.description:
Provides the System.Diagnostics.EventLog class, which allows the applications to use the Windows event log service.
Commonly Used Types: System.Diagnostics.EventLog

component.name: System.Drawing.Common
component.description:
Provides access to GDI+ graphics functionality.
Commonly Used Types: System.Drawing.Bitmap System.Drawing.BitmapData System.Drawing.Brush System.Drawing.Font System.Drawing.Graphics System.Drawing.Icon
Unix support is disabled by default. See https://aka.ms/systemdrawingnonwindows for more information.

component.name: System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt
component.description: Includes types that provide support for creating, serializing and validating JSON Web Tokens. As of IdentityModel 7x, this is a legacy tool that should be replaced with Microsoft.IdentityModel.JsonWebTokens.

component.name: System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt
component.description: Includes types that provide support for creating, serializing and validating JSON Web Tokens. As of IdentityModel 7x, this is a legacy tool that should be replaced with Microsoft.IdentityModel.JsonWebTokens.

component.name: System.IO.Packaging
component.description: Provides classes that support storage of multiple data objects in a single container.

author.name: ZZZ Projects,Stef Heyenrath,Microsoft,Scott Guthrie,King Wilder,Nathan Arnott

component.name: System.Linq.Dynamic.Core
component.description: This is a .NETStandard / .NET Core port of the the Microsoft assembly for the .Net 4.0 Dynamic language functionality.

component.name: System.Management
component.description:
Provides access to a rich set of management information and management events about the system, devices, and applications instrumented to the Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) infrastructure.
Commonly Used Types: System.Management.ManagementClass System.Management.ManagementObject System.Management.SelectQuery

component.name: System.Memory.Data
component.description:
A lightweight abstraction for a payload of bytes. Provides methods for converting between strings, streams, JSON, and bytes.
Commonly Used Types: System.BinaryData

component.name: System.Memory.Data
component.description:
A lightweight abstraction for a payload of bytes. Provides methods for converting between strings, streams, JSON, and bytes.
Commonly Used Types: System.BinaryData

component.name: System.Security.Cryptography.Pkcs
component.description:
Provides support for PKCS and CMS algorithms.
Commonly Used Types: System.Security.Cryptography.Pkcs.EnvelopedCms

component.name: System.Security.Cryptography.ProtectedData
component.description:
Provides access to Windows Data Protection Api.
Commonly Used Types: System.Security.Cryptography.DataProtectionScope System.Security.Cryptography.ProtectedData

component.name: System.Security.Cryptography.ProtectedData
component.description:
Provides access to Windows Data Protection Api.
Commonly Used Types: System.Security.Cryptography.DataProtectionScope System.Security.Cryptography.ProtectedData

component.name: System.Security.Permissions
component.description: Provides types supporting Code Access Security (CAS).

component.name: System.Windows.Extensions
component.description:
Provides miscellaneous Windows-specific types
Commonly Used Types: System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2UI System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509SelectionFlag

component.name: TimeZoneConverter
component.description: Lightweight library to convert quickly between IANA, Windows, and Rails time zone names.

component.name: Validation
component.description: Method input validation and runtime checks that report errors or throw exceptions when failures are detected.

component.description: Package Description

component.name: xunit
component.description:
xUnit.net is a developer testing framework, built to support Test Driven Development, with a design goal of extreme simplicity and alignment with framework features.
Installing this package installs xunit.core, xunit.assert, and xunit.analyzers.

component.name: xunit.abstractions
component.description: Common abstractions used to exchange information between xUnit.net and version-independent runners (xunit.abstractions.dll).

component.name: xunit.analyzers
component.description:
xUnit.net is a developer testing framework, built to support Test Driven Development, with a design goal of extreme simplicity and alignment with framework features.
Installing this package provides code analyzers to help developers find and fix frequent issues when writing tests and xUnit.net extensibility code.

component.name: xunit.assert
component.description: Includes the assertion library from xUnit.net (xunit.assert.dll). Supports .NET Standard 1.1+ and .NET 6.0+.

component.name: xunit.core
component.description: Includes the libraries for writing unit tests with xUnit.net.

component.name: xunit.extensibility.core
component.description: Includes xunit.core.dll for extensibility purposes. Supports .NET 4.5.2 or later, and .NET Standard 1.1.

component.name: xunit.extensibility.execution
component.description: Includes xunit.execution.*.dll for extensibility purposes. Supports .NET 4.5.2 or later, and .NET Standard 1.1.

component.name: xunit.runner.visualstudio
component.description: Visual Studio 2022+ Test Explorer runner for the xUnit.net framework. Capable of running xUnit.net v1.9.2 and v2.0+ tests. Supports .NET 4.6.2 or later, and .NET 6 or later.

component.name: Xunit.SkippableFact
component.description: Make your Xunit test methods self-determine to report a "skipped" result. Useful for such cases as "not supported on this platform" results or other environmental inputs.
